items.title: Europe's heatwave shifts east as France raises health alert to highest level
items.dek: Temperatures in Germany could hit 40C in some areas while French officials say deaths linked to the heat are being seen among young people.
items.body: Temperatures in Germany could hit 40C in some areas while French officials say deaths linked to the heat are being seen among young people.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Key figure in South Africa police corruption scandal pleads guilty
items.dek: Prosecutors say Vusimusi "Cat" Matlala could provide evidence against "high-ranking officials".
items.body: Prosecutors say Vusimusi "Cat" Matlala could provide evidence against "high-ranking officials".
